items.final_wording: Requires red-flag identification and lists myelopathic symptoms, fever, immunosuppression, weight loss, cancer, systemic symptoms, chest symptoms, and significant trauma.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Neck Pain – 22
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult neck-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for in-person examination, paediatric patients, and non-Dubai settings.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires red-flag identification and lists myelopathic symptoms, fever, immunosuppression, weight loss, cancer, systemic symptoms, chest symptoms, and significant trauma.

items.rationale: Supports cervical pain red-flag assessment for cervical pain clinic review; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports onset, duration, pain character, arm radiation, paraesthesia, activity impact, posture, movement, range of motion, palpation, neurological assessment, gait, and provocative-manoeuvre documentation.

items.rationale: Supports onset, radiation, activity, posture, range, neurological and gait documentation for cervical pain clinic review; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Lists trauma, persistent symptoms, headache, numbness or tingling, lower-limb weakness, gait or coordination issues, bowel or bladder dysfunction, immunosuppression, weight loss, fever, and chest symptoms.
